calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-22-2004 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-22-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: MICHAEL SHERWOOD ROSSOFF FOR PLAINTIFF PAUL HUANG; AND RICHARD JORDAN, PROPERTY MANAGER. DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER MICHELL IN PRO PER

CASE SETTLED. THE PARIES SIGNED A STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT WHICH WILL NOT BE FILED UNLESS DEFENDANT BREACHES THE TERMS OF THE AGREEMENT WHICH ARE AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF PAUL HUANG SHALL RECOVER POSSESSION OF 958 GEARY STREET, SAN FRANCISCO.
JUDGMENT WILL BE STAYED AS LONG AS DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER MITCHELL PAYS $1500 MONEY ORDER TO LAW OFFICES OF MICHAEL ROSSOFF BY SEPTEMBER 23, 2004 BY 5:00PM.
DEFENDANT CHRISTOPER MITCHELL PAYS TO PLAINTIFF $1432. IN BACK RENT AND $750 ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS PAID IN INSTALLMENTS OF $363.66 PER MONTH BEGINNING 10/1/04 AND ENDING 3/1/05.
BEGINNING 10/1/04 DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER MITCHELL PAY MONTHLY RENT OF $1336.
IF ANY PAYMENT IS MORE THAN FIVE DAYS LATE PLAINTIFF MAY OBTAIN JUDGMENT EXPARTE ON 24 HOURS NOTICE TO DEFENDANT.
ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISES SHALL BE SURRENDERED.
PLAINTIFF SHALL DISMISS ACTION IF ALL PAYMENTS ARE MADE ON TIME.

JUDGE PRO TEM: CATHY MOSBRUCKER CLERK: BARBARA MORRIS; REPORTER:NOT REPORTED (218)

payments.description: FIRST FILING UD COMPLT LESS THAN 2,500
